title: Peter Thiel dumps entire Nvidia stake, slashes Tesla holdings amid bubble fears
sentences: Peter Thiel dumps entire Nvidia stake, slashes Tesla holdings amid bubble fears Billionaire Peter Thiel has sold his entire stake in Nvidia and significantly reduced his holdings in Tesla, citing concerns about an "AI-fueled bubble" in tech valuations.
This move follows similar actions from SoftBank Group and investor Michael Burry, highlighting growing apprehension regarding inflated tech stock prices.
Thiel, a co-founder of Paypal and Palantir, had previously voiced worries about stretched valuations in the tech sector.
